fields.name: targetEntity
fields.description: The entity to which the reminder applies.

fields.name: recordCount
fields.description: The number of records processed during this run.

fields.name: ranAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the process was executed.

fields.name: errors
fields.description: Records any errors encountered during processing.

fields.name: dueAt
fields.description: Deadline timestamp (also lets the standalone default target validate).

fields.name: remindedAt
fields.description: When this record was last reminded — the dedup marker; 0 = not yet reminded.

fields.name: headId
fields.description: Scratch: id of the record the scan loop is currently reminding.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Which date field is the deadline?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Numeric (ms-epoch) field on the target entity holding the deadline (e.g. 'dueAt', 'startsAt').
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: due date field, timestamp field, cutoff field, expiry field, when it's due

overridableConfigKeys.label: Send deadline reminders
overridableConfigKeys.description: Automatically remind about upcoming deadlines. Off by default.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: enable, turn on, activate, switch on, reminders, deadline reminders, due-date reminders, advance notice, heads up, nudge before due

overridableConfigKeys.label: How many hours before the deadline to remind?
overridableConfigKeys.description: A reminder fires once the deadline is within this many hours of now.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: advance notice, lead time, heads up, early warning hours, how far ahead

overridableConfigKeys.label: How urgent are the reminders?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Severity passed to the notifier: info / warning / error.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: urgency level, priority, importance, alert level, how urgent

overridableConfigKeys.label: Target entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity to scan for upcoming deadlines (e.g. 'Task', 'ClassSession'). Defaults to the atom's own log so the standalone validates; rebind per composition. Typed `entity`, so a rename of the bound entity threads through to this value automatically.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: entity to monitor, entity to watch, record type, object type

overridableConfigKeys.label: What should the reminder message say?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Message body passed to the notifier.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: message text, reminder body, notification copy, alert message, what to say
